fields.name: Source_Sample
fields.description: 'M' for the 1,008 sources from the main Chandra source catalog, 'S' for the 47 lower-significance sources from the supplementary NIR-bright catalog

fields.name: XID_Source_Number
fields.description: Unique XID per sample, in order of increasing J2000 RA

fields.name: Name
fields.description: Source name with prefix 'CXOCDFS' and the J2000.0 position truncated to 0.1 s in RA and 1 arcsec in Declination

fields.name: RA
fields.description: Right Ascension (J2000, to 1e-6 deg)

fields.name: Dec
fields.description: Declination (J2000, to 1e-6 deg)

fields.name: Log_Min_NS_Prob
fields.description: Minimum value of log PB (binomial no-source probability) among the three standard bands; main-catalog threshold PB < 0.007; supplementary 0.007 <= PB < 0.1 with bright Ks <= 23 TENIS counterpart

fields.name: Error_Radius
fields.description: 1-sigma (~68%) positional uncertainty; 90% and 95% confidence levels are ~1.6x and ~2.0x this value

fields.name: Off_Axis
fields.description: Off-axis angle from the 7 Ms average aim point

fields.name: FB_Counts
fields.description: Aperture-corrected net counts in the full band (0.5-7 keV); 90% upper limits for non-detections

fields.name: SB_Counts
fields.description: Aperture-corrected net counts in the soft band (0.5-2 keV)

fields.name: HB_Counts
fields.description: Aperture-corrected net counts in the hard band (2-7 keV)

fields.name: Ctrpart_Catalog
fields.description: Primary multiwavelength counterpart catalog, in priority order: CANDELS, GOODS-S, GEMS, TENIS, WFI, SEDS

fields.name: Offset
fields.description: X-ray-to-counterpart offset

fields.name: Spect_Redshift
fields.description: Spectroscopic redshift (stars set to 0); flag column marks 'Secure' or 'Insecure'

fields.name: Redshift
fields.description: Adopted redshift; reference codes H14, L10, R11, S14, S16, zSpec

fields.name: Band_Ratio
fields.description: Hard-to-soft count-rate ratio (BEHR Bayesian estimates)

fields.name: Photon_Index
fields.description: Effective photon index Gamma; 1.4 adopted for full-band-only sources

fields.name: FB_Flux
fields.description: Full-band flux; negative values indicate 90% confidence-level upper limits

fields.name: SB_Flux
fields.description: Soft-band flux

fields.name: HB_Flux
fields.description: Hard-band flux

fields.name: RF_Lx
fields.description: Apparent rest-frame 0.5-7 keV luminosity (K-corrected, Galactic-absorption-corrected, not intrinsic-absorption-corrected)

fields.name: NH
fields.description: Intrinsic column density via PIMMS assuming intrinsic Gamma = 1.8 (zero if effective Gamma > 1.8)

fields.name: Abs_Corr_Lx
fields.description: Absorption-corrected intrinsic 0.5-7 keV luminosity

fields.name: Broad_Type
fields.description: AGN, star, or galaxy classification (paper Section 4.5 criteria)

fields.name: X11_Source_Number
fields.description: Matched 4 Ms CDF-S source ID (Xue et al. 2011; 'S' suffix for supplementary)
